name: Alakazam - Base
description:
Evolves from: Kadabra

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Damage Swap: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move 1 damage counter from 1 of your Pokémon to another as long as you don't Knock Out that Pokémon. This power can't be used if Alakazam is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic + Psychic) - Confuse Ray: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Flavor: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5000.

name: Blastoise - Base
description:
Evolves from: Wartortle

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Rain Dance: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may attach 1 Water Energy card to 1 of your Water Pokémon. (This doesn't use up your 1 Energy card attachment for the turn.) This power can't be used if Blastoise is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Water + Water + Water) - Hydro Pump: 40+ damage. Does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Blastoise but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. Extra Water Energy after the 2nd doesn't count.

Flavor: A brutal Pokémon with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high-speed tackles.

name: Chansey - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Scrunch: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Chansey during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Double-edge: 80 damage. Chansey does 80 damage to itself.

Evolves into: Blissey

Flavor: A rare and elusive Pokémon that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to catch it.

name: Charizard - Base
description:
Evolves from: Charmeleon

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Energy Burn: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may turn all Energy attached to Charizard into Fire Energy for the rest of the turn. This power can't be used if Charizard is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Fire + Fire + Fire + Fire) - Fire Spin: 100 damage. Discard 2 Energy cards attached to Charizard in order to use this attack.

Flavor: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to unintentionally cause forest fires.

name: Clefairy - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Sing: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Metronome: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Metronome copies that attack except for its Energy costs and anything else required in order to use that attack, such as discarding Energy cards. (No matter what type the Defending Pokémon is, Clefairy's type is still Colorless.)

Evolves into: Clefable

Flavor: Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas.

name: Gyarados - Base
description:
Evolves from: Magikarp

Attack (Water + Water + Water) - Dragon Rage: 50 damage. 

Attack (Water + Water + Water + Water) - Bubblebeam: 40 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Flavor: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

name: Hitmonchan - Base
description:
Attack (Fighting) - Jab: 20 damage. 

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Colorless) - Special Punch: 40 damage. 

Flavor: While seeming to do nothing, it fires punches in lightning-fast volleys that are impossible to see.

name: Machamp - Base
description:
Evolves from: Machoke

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Strikes Back: Whenever your opponent's attack damages Machamp (even if Machamp is Knocked Out), this power does 10 damage to the attacking Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.) This power can't be used if Machamp is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed when your opponent attacks.

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Fighting + Colorless) - Seismic Toss: 60 damage. 

Flavor: Using its amazing muscles, it throws powerful punches that can knock its victim clear over the horizon.

name: Magneton - Base
description:
Evolves from: Magnemite

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Colorless) - Thunder Wave: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Colorless + Colorless) - Selfdestruct: 80 damage. Does 20 damage to each Pokémon on each player's Bench. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Magneton does 80 damage to itself.

Evolves into: Magnezone

Flavor: Formed by several Magnemites linked together. It frequently appears when sunspots flare up.

name: Mewtwo - Base
description:
Attack (Psychic + Colorless) - Psychic: 10+ damage. Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic) - Barrier: Discard 1 Psychic Energy card attached to Mewtwo in order to prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Mewtwo during your opponent's next turn.

Flavor: A scientist created this Pokémon after years of horrific gene-splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

name: Nidoking - Base
description:
Evolves from: Nidorino

Attack (Grass + Colorless + Colorless) - Thrash: 30+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage; if tails, this attack does 30 damage and Nidoking does 10 damage to itself.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Grass) - Toxic: 20 damage. The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. It now takes 20 Poison damage instead of 10 after each player's turn (even if it was already Poisoned).

Flavor: Uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break its prey's bones.

name: Ninetales - Base
description:
Evolves from: Vulpix

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Lure: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and switch it with his or her Active Pokémon.

Attack (Fire + Fire + Fire + Fire) - Fire Blast: 80 damage. Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Ninetales in order to use this attack.

Flavor: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.

name: Poliwrath - Base
description:
Evolves from: Poliwhirl

Attack (Water + Water + Colorless) - Water Gun: 30+ damage. Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Poliwrath but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. Extra Water Energy after the 2nd doesn't count.

Attack (Water + Water + Colorless + Colorless) - Whirlpool: 40 damage. If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, choose 1 of them and discard it.

Flavor: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breaststroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.

name: Raichu - Base
description:
Evolves from: Pikachu

Attack (Lightning + Colorless + Colorless) - Agility: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Raichu.

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Lightning + Colorless) - Thunder: 60 damage. Flip a coin. If tails, Raichu does 30 damage to itself.

Flavor: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

name: Venusaur - Base
description:
Evolves from: Ivysaur

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Energy Trans: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may take 1 Grass Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon and attach it to a different one. This power can't be used if Venusaur is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Grass + Grass) - Solarbeam: 60 damage. 

Flavor: This plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: Zapdos - Base
description:
Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Lightning + Colorless) - Thunder: 60 damage. Flip a coin. If tails, Zapdos does 30 damage to itself.

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Lightning + Lightning) - Thunderbolt: 100 damage. Discard all Energy cards attached to Zapdos in order to use this attack.

Flavor: A legendary bird Pokémon said to appear from clouds while wielding enormous lightning bolts.

name: Beedrill - Base
description:
Evolves from: Kakuna

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Twineedle: 30× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Grass) - Poison Sting: 40 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Flavor: Flies at high speed and attacks using the large, venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail.

name: Dragonair - Base
description:
Evolves from: Dratini

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Slam: 30× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Hyper Beam: 20 damage. If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, choose 1 of them and discard it.

Evolves into: Dragonite

Flavor: A mystical Pokémon that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.

name: Dugtrio - Base
description:
Evolves from: Diglett

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Colorless) - Slash: 40 damage. 

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Fighting + Fighting) - Earthquake: 70 damage. Does 10 damage to each of your own Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Flavor: A team of Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

name: Electabuzz - Base
description:
Attack (Lightning) - Thundershock: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Lightning + Colorless) - Thunderpunch: 30+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage; if tails, this attack does 30 damage plus Electabuzz does 10 damage to itself.

Evolves into: Electivire

Flavor: Normally found near power plants, it can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.

name: Electrode - Base
description:
Evolves from: Voltorb

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Buzzap: At any time during your turn (before your attack), you may Knock Out Electrode and attach it to 1 of your other Pokémon. If you do, choose a type of Energy. Electrode is now an Energy card (instead of a Pokémon) that provides 2 energy of that type. You can't use this power if Electrode is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Lightning) - Electric Shock: 50 damage. Flip a coin. If tails, Electrode does 10 damage to itself.

Flavor: It stores electrical energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

name: Pidgeotto - Base
description:
Evolves from: Pidgey

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Whirlwind: 20 damage. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Mirror Move: If Pidgeotto was attacked last turn, do the final result of that attack on Pidgeotto to the Defending Pokémon.

Evolves into: Pidgeot

Flavor: Very protective of its sprawling territory, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

name: Arcanine - Base
description:
Evolves from: Growlithe

Attack (Fire + Fire + Colorless) - Flamethrower: 50 damage. Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Arcanine in order to use this attack.

Attack (Fire + Fire + Colorless + Colorless) - Take Down: 80 damage. Arcanine does 30 damage to itself.

Flavor: A Pokémon that has been long admired for its beauty. It runs gracefully, as if on wings.

name: Charmeleon - Base
description:
Evolves from: Charmander

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Slash: 30 damage. 

Attack (Fire + Fire + Colorless) - Flamethrower: 50 damage. Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Charmeleon in order to use this attack.

Evolves into: Charizard

Flavor: When it swings its burning tail, it raises the temperature to unbearably high levels.

name: Dewgong - Base
description:
Evolves from: Seel

Attack (Water + Water + Colorless) - Aurora Beam: 50 damage. 

Attack (Water + Water + Colorless + Colorless) - Ice Beam: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Flavor: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.

name: Dratini - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Pound: 10 damage. 

Evolves into: Dragonair

Flavor: Long considered a mythical Pokémon until recently, when a small colony was found living underwater.

name: Farfetch'd - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Leek Slap: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. Either way, you can't use this attack again as long as Farfetch'd stays in play (even putting Farfetch'd on the Bench won't let you use it again).

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Pot Smash: 30 damage. 

Evolves into: Sirfetch'd

Flavor: The sprig of green onions it holds is its weapon. This sprig is used much like a metal sword.

name: Growlithe - Base
description:
Attack (Fire + Colorless) - Flare: 20 damage. 

Evolves into: Arcanine

Flavor: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

name: Haunter - Base
description:
Evolves from: Gastly

Attack (Psychic) - Hypnosis: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic) - Dream Eater: 50 damage. You can't use this attack unless the Defending Pokémon is Asleep.

Evolves into: Gengar

Flavor: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from another dimension.

name: Ivysaur - Base
description:
Evolves from: Bulbasaur

Attack (Grass + Colorless + Colorless) - Vine Whip: 30 damage. 

Attack (Grass + Grass + Grass) - Poisonpowder: 20 damage. The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Evolves into: Venusaur

Flavor: When the bulb on its back grows large, the Pokémon seems to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

name: Jynx - Base
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Doubleslap: 10× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic + Colorless) - Meditate: 20+ damage. Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

Flavor: Merely by meditating, the Pokémon launches a powerful psychic energy attack.

name: Kadabra - Base
description:
Evolves from: Abra

Attack (Psychic + Psychic) - Recover: Discard 1 Psychic Energy card attached to Kadabra in order to use this attack. Remove all damage counters from Kadabra.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic + Colorless) - Super Psy: 50 damage. 

Evolves into: Alakazam

Flavor: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches even to those just nearby.

name: Kakuna - Base
description:
Evolves from: Weedle

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Stiffen: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Kakuna during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Poisonpowder: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Evolves into: Beedrill

Flavor: Almost incapable of moving, this Pokémon can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.

name: Machoke - Base
description:
Evolves from: Machop

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Colorless) - Karate Chop: 50- damage. Does 50 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on Machoke.

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Colorless + Colorless) - Submission: 60 damage. Machoke does 20 damage to itself.

Evolves into: Machamp

Flavor: Its muscular body is so powerful that it must wear a power-save belt to help regulate its motions.

name: Magikarp - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Tackle: 10 damage. 

Attack (Water) - Flail: 10× damage. Does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Magikarp.

Evolves into: Gyarados

Flavor: In the distant past, it was stronger than its horribly weak descendants that exist today.

name: Magmar - Base
description:
Attack (Fire + Fire) - Fire Punch: 30 damage. 

Attack (Fire + Fire + Colorless) - Flamethrower: 50 damage. Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Magmar in order to use this attack.

Evolves into: Magmortar

Flavor: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.

name: Nidorino - Base
description:
Evolves from: Nidoran ♂

Attack (Grass + Colorless + Colorless) - Double Kick: 30× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Colorless + Colorless) - Horn Drill: 50 damage. 

Evolves into: Nidoking

Flavor: An aggressive Pokémon that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.

name: Poliwhirl - Base
description:
Evolves from: Poliwag

Attack (Water + Water) - Amnesia: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. That Pokémon can't use that attack during your opponent's next turn.

Attack (Water + Water + Colorless) - Doubleslap: 30× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

Evolves into: Poliwrath, Politoed

Flavor: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.

name: Porygon - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Conversion 1: If the Defending Pokémon has a Weakness, you may change it to a type of your choice other than Colorless.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Conversion 2: Change Porygon's Resistance to a type of your choice other than Colorless.

Evolves into: Porygon2

Flavor: A Pokémon that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

name: Raticate - Base
description:
Evolves from: Rattata

Attack (Colorless) - Bite: 20 damage. 

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Super Fang: Does damage to the Defending Pokémon equal to half the Defending Pokémon's remaining HP (rounded up to the nearest 10).

Flavor: It uses its whiskers to maintain its balance. It seems to slow down if they are cut off.

name: Seel - Base
description:
Attack (Water) - Headbutt: 10 damage. 

Evolves into: Dewgong

Flavor: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. This horn is used for bashing through thick ice.

name: Wartortle - Base
description:
Evolves from: Squirtle

Attack (Water + Colorless) - Withdraw: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Wartortle during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

Attack (Water + Colorless + Colorless) - Bite: 40 damage. 

Evolves into: Blastoise

Flavor: Often hides in water to stalk unweary prey. When swimming quickly, it moves its ears to maintain balance.

name: Abra - Base
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Psyshock: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Evolves into: Kadabra

Flavor: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and teleport to safety.

name: Bulbasaur - Base
description:
Attack (Grass + Grass) - Leech Seed: 20 damage. Unless all damage from this attack is prevented, you may remove 1 damage counter from Bulbasaur.

Evolves into: Ivysaur

Flavor: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. Thus, a plant sprouted and now grows with this Pokémon.

name: Caterpie - Base
description:
Attack (Grass) - String Shot: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Evolves into: Metapod

Flavor: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

name: Charmander - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Scratch: 10 damage. 

Attack (Fire + Colorless) - Ember: 30 damage. Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Charmander in order to use this attack.

Evolves into: Charmeleon

Flavor: Obviously prefers hot places. If it gets caught in the rain, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

name: Diglett - Base
description:
Attack (Fighting) - Dig: 10 damage. 

Attack (Fighting + Fighting) - Mud Slap: 30 damage. 

Evolves into: Dugtrio

Flavor: Lives about three feet underground, where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.

name: Doduo - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Fury Attack: 10× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

Evolves into: Dodrio

Flavor: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.

name: Drowzee - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Pound: 10 damage. 

Attack (Psychic + Psychic) - Confuse Ray: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Evolves into: Hypno

Flavor: Puts enemies to sleep, then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams.

name: Gastly - Base
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Sleeping Gas: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Attack (Psychic + Colorless) - Destiny Bond: Discard 1 Psychic Energy card attached to Gastly in order to use this attack. If a Pokémon Knocks Out Gastly during your opponent's next turn, Knock Out that Pokémon.

Evolves into: Haunter

Flavor: Almost invisible, this gaseous Pokémon cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

name: Koffing - Base
description:
Attack (Grass + Grass) - Foul Gas: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned; if tails, it is now Confused.

Evolves into: Weezing

Flavor: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.

name: Machop - Base
description:
Attack (Fighting) - Low Kick: 20 damage. 

Evolves into: Machoke

Flavor: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.

name: Magnemite - Base
description:
Attack (Lightning) - Thunder Wave: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Lightning + Colorless) - Selfdestruct: 40 damage. Does 10 damage to each Pokémon on each player's Bench. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Magnemite does 40 damage to itself.

Evolves into: Magneton

Flavor: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses attacks like Thunder Wave.

name: Metapod - Base
description:
Evolves from: Caterpie

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Stiffen: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Metapod during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Stun Spore: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Evolves into: Butterfree

Flavor: It is vulnerable to attack because its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.

name: Nidoran ♂ - Base
description:
Attack (Grass) - Horn Hazard: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

Evolves into: Nidorino

Flavor: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger, more powerful of its horns secretes venom.

name: Onix - Base
description:
Attack (Fighting) - Rock Throw: 10 damage. 

Attack (Fighting + Fighting) - Harden: During your opponent's next turn, whenever 30 or less damage is done to Onix (after applying Weakness and Resistance), prevent that damage. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

Evolves into: Steelix

Flavor: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, though colored black.

name: Pidgey - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Whirlwind: 10 damage. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

Evolves into: Pidgeotto

Flavor: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

name: Pikachu - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Gnaw: 10 damage. 

Attack (Lightning + Colorless) - Thunder Jolt: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If tails, Pikachu does 10 damage to itself.

Evolves into: Raichu

Flavor: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can cause lightning storms.

name: Poliwag - Base
description:
Attack (Water) - Water Gun: 10+ damage. Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Poliwag but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. Extra Water Energy after the 2nd don't count.

Evolves into: Poliwhirl

Flavor: Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming over trying to stand.

name: Ponyta - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Smash Kick: 20 damage. 

Attack (Fire + Fire) - Flame Tail: 30 damage. 

Evolves into: Rapidash

Flavor: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything flat in moments.

name: Rattata - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Bite: 20 damage. 

Evolves into: Raticate

Flavor: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.

name: Sandshrew - Base
description:
Attack (Fighting) - Sand-attack: 10 damage. If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

Evolves into: Sandslash

Flavor: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

name: Squirtle - Base
description:
Attack (Water) - Bubble: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Water + Colorless) - Withdraw: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Squirtle during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

Evolves into: Wartortle

Flavor: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. It powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

name: Starmie - Base
description:
Evolves from: Staryu

Attack (Water + Water) - Recover: Discard 1 Water Energy card attached to Starmie in order to use this attack. Remove all damage counters from Starmie.

Attack (Water + Colorless + Colorless) - Star Freeze: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Flavor: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people value this core as a gem.

name: Staryu - Base
description:
Attack (Water) - Slap: 20 damage. 

Evolves into: Starmie

Flavor: An enigmatic Pokémon that can effortlessly regenerate any appendage it loses in battle.

name: Tangela - Base
description:
Attack (Grass + Colorless) - Bind: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Grass) - Poisonpowder: 20 damage. The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Evolves into: Tangrowth

Flavor: Its whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to seaweed. These vines shake as it walks.

name: Voltorb - Base
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Tackle: 10 damage. 

Evolves into: Electrode

Flavor: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a Monster Ball, it has zapped many people.

name: Vulpix - Base
description:
Attack (Fire + Fire) - Confuse Ray: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Evolves into: Ninetales

Flavor: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. Its tail splits from the tip as it grows older.

name: Weedle - Base
description:
Attack (Grass) - Poison Sting: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Evolves into: Kakuna

Flavor: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp, venomous stinger on its head.

name: Clefable - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Clefairy

Attack (Colorless) - Metronome: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Metronome copies that attack except for its Energy costs and anything else required in order to use that attack, such as discarding Energy cards. (No matter what type the Defending Pokémon is, Clefable's type is still Colorless.)

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Minimize: All damage done by attacks to Clefable during your opponent's next turn is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Flavor: A timid Fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Electrode - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Voltorb

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Tackle: 20 damage. 

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Lightning) - Chain Lightning: 20 damage. If the Defending Pokémon isn't Colorless, this attack does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon of the same type as the Defending Pokémon (including your own).

Flavor: It stores electrical energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

name: Flareon - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Eevee

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Quick Attack: 10+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

Attack (Fire + Fire + Colorless + Colorless) - Flamethrower: 60 damage. Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Flareon in order to use this attack.

Flavor: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.

name: Jolteon - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Eevee

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Quick Attack: 10+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Colorless) - Pin Missile: 20× damage. Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

Flavor: It accumulates negative ions from the atmosphere to blast out 10,000-volt lightning bolts.

name: Kangaskhan - Jungle
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Fetch: Draw a card.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Comet Punch: 20× damage. Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

Flavor: The infant rarely ventures out of its mother's protective pouch until it is three years old.

name: Mr. Mime - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Mime Jr.

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Invisible Wall: Whenever an attack (including your own) does 30 or more damage to Mr. Mime (after applying Weakness and Resistance), prevent that damage. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.) This power can't be used if Mr. Mime is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Psychic + Colorless) - Meditate: 10+ damage. Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

Flavor: If interrupted while miming, it will slap around the enemy with its broad hands.

name: Nidoqueen - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Nidorina

Attack (Grass + Colorless) - Boyfriends: 20+ damage. Does 20 damage plus 20 more damage for each Nidoking you have in play.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Colorless + Colorless) - Mega Punch: 50 damage. 

Flavor: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.

name: Pidgeot - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Pidgeotto

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Wing Attack: 20 damage. 

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Hurricane: 30 damage. Unless this attack Knocks Out the Defending Pokémon, return the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your opponent's hand.

Flavor: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as Magikarp.

name: Pinsir - Jungle
description:
Attack (Grass + Grass) - Irongrip: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Colorless + Colorless) - Guillotine: 50 damage. 

Flavor: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will swing its victim around and toss it hard.

name: Scyther - Jungle
description:
Attack (Grass) - Swords Dance: During your next turn, Scyther's Slash attack's base damage is 60 instead of 30.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Slash: 30 damage. 

Evolves into: Scizor

Flavor: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one of it.

name: Snorlax - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Munchlax

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Thick Skinned: Snorlax can't become Asleep, Confused, Paralyzed, or Poisoned. This power can't be used if Snorlax is already Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Body Slam: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Flavor: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.

name: Vaporeon - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Eevee

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Quick Attack: 10+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

Attack (Water + Water + Colorless) - Water Gun: 30+ damage. Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Vaporeon but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. Extra Water Energy after the 2nd doesn't count.

Flavor: Lives close to water. Its long tail is ridged with a fin that is often mistaken for a mermaid's.

name: Venomoth - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Venonat

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Shift: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may change the type of Venomoth to the type of any other Pokémon in play other than Colorless. This power can't be used if Venomoth is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Venom Powder: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused and Poisoned.

Flavor: The dust-like scales covering its wings are color coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has.

name: Victreebel - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Weepinbell

Attack (Grass) - Lure: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and switch it with his or her Active Pokémon.

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Acid: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your next turn.

Flavor: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

name: Vileplume - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Gloom

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Heal: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, remove 1 damage counter from 1 of your Pokémon. This power can't be used if Vileplume is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Grass) - Petal Dance: 40× damage. Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads. Vileplume is now Confused (after doing damage).

Flavor: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

name: Wigglytuff - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Jigglypuff

Attack (Colorless) - Lullaby: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Do the Wave: 10+ damage. Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

Flavor: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.

name: Clefable - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Clefairy

Attack (Colorless) - Metronome: Choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Metronome copies that attack except for its Energy costs and anything else required in order to use that attack, such as discarding Energy cards. (No matter what type the Defending Pokémon is, Clefable's type is still Colorless.)

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Minimize: All damage done by attacks to Clefable during your opponent's next turn is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Flavor: A timid Fairy Pokémon that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

name: Electrode - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Voltorb

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Tackle: 20 damage. 

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Lightning) - Chain Lightning: 20 damage. If the Defending Pokémon isn't Colorless, this attack does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon of the same type as the Defending Pokémon (including your own).

Flavor: It stores electrical energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

name: Flareon - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Eevee

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Quick Attack: 10+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

Attack (Fire + Fire + Colorless + Colorless) - Flamethrower: 60 damage. Discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Flareon in order to use this attack.

Flavor: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.

description:
Evolves from: Eevee

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Quick Attack: 10+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Colorless) - Pin Missile: 20× damage. Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

Flavor: It accumulates negative ions from the atmosphere to blast out 10,000-volt lightning bolts.

Attack (Psychic + Colorless) - Meditate: 10+ damage. Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

Flavor: If interrupted while miming, it will slap around the enemy with its broad hands.

Attack (Grass + Colorless) - Boyfriends: 20+ damage. Does 20 damage plus 20 more damage for each Nidoking you have in play.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Colorless + Colorless) - Mega Punch: 50 damage.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Hurricane: 30 damage. Unless this attack Knocks Out the Defending Pokémon, return the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your opponent's hand.

Flavor: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as Magikarp.

Evolves into: Scizor

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Quick Attack: 10+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

Attack (Water + Water + Colorless) - Water Gun: 30+ damage. Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Vaporeon but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. Extra Water Energy after the 2nd doesn't count.

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Acid: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your next turn.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Grass) - Petal Dance: 40× damage. Flip 3 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads. Vileplume is now Confused (after doing damage).

Flavor: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

name: Wigglytuff - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Jigglypuff

Attack (Colorless) - Lullaby: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Do the Wave: 10+ damage. Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon.

Flavor: The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size.

name: Butterfree - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Metapod

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Whirlwind: 20 damage. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

Attack (Grass + Grass + Grass + Grass) - Mega Drain: 40 damage. Remove a number of damage counters from Butterfree equal to half the damage done to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance) (rounded up to the nearest 10).

Flavor: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

name: Dodrio - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Doduo

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Retreat Aid: As long as Dodrio is Benched, pay Colorless less to retreat your Active Pokémon.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Rage: 10+ damage. Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Dodrio.

Flavor: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake.

name: Exeggutor - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Exeggcute

Attack (Psychic) - Teleport: Switch Exeggutor with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

Attack (Colorless) - Big Eggsplosion: 20× damage. Flip a number of coins equal to the number of Energy attached to Exeggutor. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

Flavor: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an Exeggcute.

name: Fearow - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Spearow

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Agility: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Fearow.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Drill Peck: 40 damage. 

Flavor: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.

name: Gloom - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Oddish

Attack (Grass) - Poisonpowder: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Foul Odor: 20 damage. Both the Defending Pokémon and Gloom are now Confused (after doing damage).

Evolves into: Vileplume, Bellossom

Flavor: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool; it is a nectar that is used to attract prey.

name: Lickitung - Jungle
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Tongue Wrap: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Supersonic: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Evolves into: Lickilicky

Flavor: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a stinging sensation when it licks enemies.

name: Marowak - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Cubone

Attack (Fighting + Fighting) - Bonemerang: 30× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Colorless) - Call for Friend: Search your deck for a Fighting Basic Pokémon card and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. (You can't use this attack if your Bench is full.)

Flavor: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to K.O. targets.

name: Nidorina - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Nidoran ♀

Attack (Grass) - Supersonic: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Attack (Grass + Colorless + Colorless) - Double Kick: 30× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

Evolves into: Nidoqueen

Flavor: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.

name: Parasect - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Paras

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Spore: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Slash: 30 damage. 

Flavor: A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has taken over the host bug. Prefers damp places.

name: Persian - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Meowth

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Scratch: 20 damage. 

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Pounce: 30 damage. If the Defending Pokémon attacks Persian during your next turn, any damage done by the attack is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). (Benching either Pokémon ends this effect.)

Flavor: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

name: Primeape - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Mankey

Attack (Fighting + Fighting) - Fury Swipes: 20× damage. Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Colorless) - Tantrum: 50 damage. Flip a coin. If tails, Primeape is now Confused (after doing damage).

Flavor: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until its quarry is caught.

name: Rapidash - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Ponyta

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Stomp: 20+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage; if tails, this attack does 20 damage.

Attack (Fire + Fire + Colorless) - Agility: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Rapidash.

Flavor: Very competitive, this Pokémon will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.

name: Rhydon - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Rhyhorn

Attack (Fighting + Colorless + Colorless) - Horn Attack: 30 damage. 

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Fighting + Fighting) - Ram: 50 damage. Rhydon does 20 damage to itself. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon. Switch the Pokémon even if Rhydon is knocked out.)

Evolves into: Rhyperior

Flavor: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3600 degrees.

name: Seaking - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Goldeen

Attack (Water) - Horn Attack: 10 damage. 

Attack (Water + Colorless) - Waterfall: 30 damage. 

Flavor: In the autumn spawning season, they can be seen swimming powerfully up rivers and creeks.

name: Tauros - Jungle
description:
Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Stomp: 20+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage; if tails, this attack does 20 damage.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Rampage: 20+ damage. Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Tauros. Flip a coin. If tails, Tauros is now Confused (after doing damage).

Flavor: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

name: Weepinbell - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Bellsprout

Attack (Grass) - Poisonpowder: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Razor Leaf: 30 damage. 

Evolves into: Victreebel

Flavor: It spits out poisonpowder to immobilize the enemy, and then finishes the enemy with a spray of acid.

name: Bellsprout - Jungle
description:
Attack (Grass) - Vine Whip: 10 damage. 

Attack (Grass) - Call for Family: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon named Bellsprout and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. (You can't use this attack if your Bench is full.)

Evolves into: Weepinbell

Flavor: A carnivorous Pokémon that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.

name: Cubone - Jungle
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Snivel: If the Defending Pokémon attacks Cubone during your opponent's next turn, any damage done by the attack is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). (Benching either Pokémon ends this effect.)

Attack (Fighting + Fighting) - Rage: 10+ damage. Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Cubone.

Evolves into: Marowak

Flavor: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this Pokémon's real face.

name: Eevee - Jungle
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Tail Wag: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack Eevee during your opponent's next turn. (Benching either Pokémon ends this effect.)

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Quick Attack: 10+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

Evolves into: Vaporeon, Jolteon, Flareon, Sylveon, Espeon, Umbreon, Leafeon, Glaceon

Flavor: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from elemental stones.

name: Exeggcute - Jungle
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Hypnosis: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Leech Seed: 20 damage. Unless all damage from this attack is prevented, you may remove 1 damage counter from Exeggcute.

Evolves into: Exeggutor

Flavor: Often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.

name: Goldeen - Jungle
description:
Attack (Water) - Horn Attack: 10 damage. 

Evolves into: Seaking

Flavor: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballroom dress, giving it the nickname "Water Queen."

name: Jigglypuff - Jungle
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Lullaby: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Pound: 20 damage. 

Evolves into: Wigglytuff

Flavor: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: Mankey - Jungle
description:
Ability (Pokémon Power) - Peek: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may look at one of the following: the top card of either player's deck, a random card from your opponent's hand, or one of either player's Prizes. This power can't be used if Mankey is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Colorless) - Scratch: 10 damage. 

Evolves into: Primeape

Flavor: Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment, then thrashing away the next.

name: Meowth - Jungle
description:
Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Pay Day: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, draw a card.

Evolves into: Persian

Flavor: Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

name: Nidoran ♀ - Jungle
description:
Attack (Grass) - Fury Swipes: 10× damage. Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Call for Family: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon named Nidoran ♂ or Nidoran ♀ and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. (You can't use this attack if your Bench is full.)

Evolves into: Nidorina

Flavor: Although small, its venomous barbs make this Pokémon dangerous. The female has smaller horns.

name: Oddish - Jungle
description:
Attack (Grass) - Stun Spore: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Sprout: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon named Oddish and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. (You can't use this attack if your Bench is full.)

Evolves into: Gloom

Flavor: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.

name: Paras - Jungle
description:
Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Scratch: 20 damage. 

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Spore: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Evolves into: Parasect

Flavor: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by drawing nutrients from the bug host.

name: Pikachu - Jungle
description:
Evolves from: Pichu

Attack (Lightning + Lightning) - Spark: 20 damage. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 10 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Evolves into: Raichu

Flavor: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can build and cause lightning storms.

name: Rhyhorn - Jungle
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Leer: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack Rhyhorn during your opponent's next turn. (Benching either Pokémon ends this effect.)

Attack (Fighting + Colorless + Colorless) - Horn Attack: 30 damage. 

Evolves into: Rhydon

Flavor: Its massive bones are 1,000 times harder than human bones. It can easily knock a trailer flying.

name: Spearow - Jungle
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Peck: 10 damage. 

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Mirror Move: If Spearow was attacked last turn, do the final result of that attack on Spearow to the Defending Pokémon.

Evolves into: Fearow

Flavor: Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speeds to stay airborne.

name: Venonat - Jungle
description:
Attack (Grass) - Stun Spore: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Grass + Colorless) - Leech Life: 10 damage. Remove a number of damage counters from Venonat equal to the damage done to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Evolves into: Venomoth

Flavor: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats insects. It is attracted by light at night.

name: Pikachu - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Growl: If the Defending Pokémon attacks Pikachu during your opponent's next turn, any damage done by the attack is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). (Benching either Pokémon ends this effect.)

Attack (Lightning + Lightning) - Thundershock: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Evolves into: Raichu

Flavor: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms.

name: Electabuzz - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Lightning) - Light Screen: Whenever an attack does damage to Electabuzz (after applying Weakness and Resistance) during your opponent's next turn, that attack only does half the damage to Electabuzz (rounded down to the nearest 10). (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Quick Attack: 10+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

Evolves into: Electivire

Flavor: A wild Pokémon with a short temper. It is able to distinguish colors, and likes the color red.

name: Mewtwo - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Energy Absorption: Choose up to 2 Energy cards from your discard pile and attach them to Mewtwo.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic + Colorless) - Psyburn: 40 damage. 

Flavor: Years of genetic experiments resulted in the creation of this never-before-seen violent Pokémon.

name: Pikachu - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Lightning) - Recharge: Search your deck for a Lightning Energy card and attach it to Pikachu. Shuffle your deck afterward.

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Lightning) - Thunderbolt: 50 damage. Discard all Energy cards attached to Pikachu in order to use this attack.

Evolves into: Raichu

Flavor: When several of these Pokémon gather, they attract so much electricity that they can cause lightning to strike.

name: Dragonite - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Evolves from: Dragonair

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Special Delivery: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may draw a card. If you do, choose a card from your hand and put it on top of your deck. This power can't be used if Dragonite is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Supersonic Flight: 60 damage. Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

Flavor: This Pokémon can fly is spite of its large bulk. It is said to be able to circumnavigate the earth in just 16 hours.

name: Arcanine - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Evolves from: Growlithe

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Quick Attack: 10+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

Attack (Fire + Fire) - Flames of Rage: 40+ damage. Discard 2 Fire Energy cards attached to Arcanine in order to use this attack. This attack does 40 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Arcanine.

Flavor: A legendary Pokémon famous for its beauty. It looks almost as if it flies when it runs.

name: Jigglypuff - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Colorless) - First Aid: Remove 1 damage counter from Jigglypuff.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Double-edge: 40 damage. Jigglypuff does 20 damage to itself.

Evolves into: Wigglytuff

Flavor: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

name: Mew - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Psywave: 10× damage. Does 10 damage times the number of Energy cards attached to the Defending Pokémon.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic) - Devolution Beam: Choose an evolved Pokémon (your own or your opponent's). Return the highest Stage Evolution card on that Pokémon to its player's hand. That Pokémon is no longer Asleep, Confused, Paralyzed, or Poisoned, or anything else that might be the result of an attack (just as if you had evolved it).

Flavor: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

name: Mew - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Psywave: 10× damage. Does 10 damage times the number of Energy cards attached to the Defending Pokémon.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic) - Devolution Beam: Choose an evolved Pokémon (your own or your opponent's). Return the highest Stage Evolution card on that Pokémon to its player's hand. That Pokémon is no longer Asleep, Confused, Paralyzed, or Poisoned, or anything else that might be the result of an attack (just as if you had evolved it).

Flavor: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

name: Meowth - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Cat Punch: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage. If tails and if your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and this attack does 20 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Evolves into: Persian

Flavor: Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

name: Eevee - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Ability (Pokémon Power) - Chain Reaction: This power can only be used when a Pokémon evolves. Search your deck for a card that evolves from Eevee and attach it to Eevee. This counts as evolving Eevee. Shuffle your deck afterward. This power can't be used if Eevee is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Colorless) - Bite: 20 damage. 

Evolves into: Vaporeon, Jolteon, Flareon, Sylveon, Espeon, Umbreon, Leafeon, Glaceon

Flavor: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from elemental stones.

name: Mewtwo - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Energy Control: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and attach it to another of your opponent's Pokémon of your choice.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic + Psychic) - Telekinesis: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for this attack. (Any other effects that would happen after applying Weakness and Resistance still happen.)

Flavor: A scientist created this Pokémon after years of horrific gene-splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

name: Venusaur - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Evolves from: Ivysaur

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Solar Power: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may use this power. Your Active Pokémon and the Defending Pokémon are no longer Asleep, Confused, Paralyzed, or Poisoned. This power can't be used if Venusaur is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Grass + Grass) - Mega Drain: 40 damage. Remove a number of damage counters from Venusaur equal to half the damage done to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance) (rounded up to the nearest 10). If Venusaur has fewer damage counters than that, remove all of them.

Flavor: This plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

name: Mewtwo - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Energy Absorption: Choose up to 2 Energy cards from your discard pile and attach them to Mewtwo.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic + Colorless) - Psyburn: 40 damage. 

Flavor: Years of genetic experiments resulted in the creation of this never-before-seen violent Pokémon.

name: Cool Porygon - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Texture Magic: You may change Cool Porygon's Resistance to a type of your choice other than Colorless. If the Defending Pokémon has a Weakness, you may change it to a type of your choice other than Colorless. (Benching either Pokémon ends the effect on that Pokémon.)

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - 3-D Attack: 20× damage. Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

Evolves into: Porygon2

Flavor: A Pokémon that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

name: Dark Persian - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Evolves from: Meowth

Attack (Colorless) - Tempt: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with the Defending Pokémon.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Poison Claws: 10 damage. Flip a coin. if heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Flavor: Popular with women because of its beautiful fur. The leader of the Rockets keeps one as a pet.

name: Team Rocket's Meowth - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Miraculous Comeback: Flip a number of coins equal to the number of Pokémon in play. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads. Then Team Rocket's Meowth does 10 damage times the number of tails to itself.

Evolves into: Persian

Flavor: This Pokémon is more active at night. It likes bright, shiny things and cannot resist taking them and adding them to its collection.

name: Sabrina's Abra - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Pound: 10 damage. 

Attack (Psychic + Colorless) - Synchronize: 40 damage. This attack can't be used unless Sabrina's Abra and the Defending Pokémon have the same number of Energy cards attached to them.

Evolves into: Kadabra

name: Psyduck - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Headache: Your opponent can't play Trainer cards during his or her next turn.

Attack (Water) - Fury Swipes: 10× damage. Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

Evolves into: Golduck

Flavor: While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily Pokémon will use psychokinetic powers.

name: Moltres - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Fire + Fire + Fire) - Hyper Flame: 60 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Moltres. If tails, discard all Energy cards attached to Moltres. If you can't discard Energy cards, this attack does nothing.

Flavor: The flames on this legendary Pokémon's wings burn so brightly that they can make night seem like day.

name: Articuno - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Water + Water + Water) - Diamond Dust: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed and this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Flavor: This legendary Pokémon is said to freeze the water in the air during winter, causing snow.

name: Zapdos - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Lightning) - Lightning Burn: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, and if your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) If tails, Zapdos does 30 damage to itself.

Flavor: This legendary Pokémon is said to be present wherever there is a lightning storm.

name: _____'s Pikachu - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Lightning + Lightning) - Birthday Surprise: 30+ damage. If it's not your birthday, this attack does 30 damage. If it is your birthday, flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 50 more damage; if tails, this attack does 30 damage.

Evolves into: Raichu

Flavor: Your Birthdate: ______________________________

name: Flying Pikachu - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Lightning) - Thundershock: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Fly: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Flying Pikachu; if tails, this attack does nothing (not even damage).

Evolves into: Raichu

Flavor: By learning how to fly, Pikachu overcame its weakness to Fighting Pokémon.

name: Pikachu - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Scratch: 10 damage. 

Attack (Lightning + Lightning) - Thunderbolt: 40 damage. Discard all Energy cards attached to Pikachu.

Evolves into: Raichu

Flavor: It uses its sensitive tail to sense its environment and has been known to react violently if its tail is grabbed.

name: Pikachu - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Lightning) - Thundershock: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Lightning + Lightning) - Agility: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Pikachu.

Evolves into: Raichu

Flavor: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can cause lightning storms.

name: Surfing Pikachu - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Water + Water) - Surf: 30 damage. 

Evolves into: Raichu

Flavor: One summer, a group of Pikachus was found riding the waves at the local beach.

name: Marill - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Water + Water) - Water Gun: 20+ damage. Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Marill but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

Evolves into: Azumarill

Flavor: The tip of its tail, which contains oil that is lighter than water, lets it swim without drowning.

name: Togepi - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Snivel: If the Defending Pokémon attacks Togepi during your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Togepi is reduced by 20 (before applying Weakness and Resistance). (Benching either Pokémon ends this effect.)

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Mini-Metronome: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon's attacks. Mini-Metronome copies that attack except for its Energy cost. (You must still do anything else in order to use that attack.) (No matter what type the Defending Pokémon is, Togepi's type is still Colorless.) Togepi performs that attack.

Evolves into: Togetic

Flavor: Still only a hatchling, it uses poison to chase off its enemies when threatened.

name: Cleffa - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Evolves from: Clefairy

Attack (Colorless) - Eek: Draw 2 cards.

Evolves into: Clefairy

Flavor: Because of its unusual, star-like silhouette, people believe that it came here on a meteor.

name: Smeargle - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Paint: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a type (other than Colorless) and put a Coloring counter on the Defending Pokémon. That Pokémon is now the type you chose. If it already had a Coloring counter, remove the old one. If tails, this attack does nothing.

Flavor: Once it becomes an adult, it has a tendency to let its comrades plant footprints on its back.

name: Scizor - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Evolves from: Scyther

Attack (Colorless) - Leer: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack Scizor during your opponent's next turn. (Benching either Pokémon ends this effect.)

Attack (Metal + Colorless + Colorless) - Metal Pincer: 30+ damage. Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

Flavor: Its wings are not used for flying. They are flapped at high speed to adjust its body temperature.

name: Entei - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Ability (Pokémon Power) - Bolt: Whenever your opponent's attack damages Entei, unless that attack Knocks Out Entei, flip a coin. If heads, shuffle Entei and all cards attached to it into your deck. This power can't be used if Entei is already Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed when it is damaged.

Attack (Fire + Fire + Fire) - Protective Flame: 50 damage. During your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to your Benched Pokémon.

Flavor: Volcanoes erupt when it barks. Unable to restrain its extreme power, it races headlong around the land.

name: Pichu - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Evolves from: Pikachu

Attack (Colorless) - Let's Play!: Search your deck for a Baby Pokémon card and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. (You can't use this attack if your Bench is full.)

Evolves into: Pikachu

Flavor: It is not yet skilled at storing electricity. It may send out a jolt if amused or startled.

name: Igglybuff - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Evolves from: Jigglypuff

Attack (Colorless) - Good Night Song: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Evolves into: Jigglypuff

Flavor: Its extremely flexible and elastic body makes it bounce continuously—anytime, anywhere.

name: Hitmontop - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Fighting + Fighting) - Repeating Kick: 20× damage. Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Colorless) - Rapid Spin: 30 damage. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with his or her Active Pokémon, then, if you have any Benched Pokémon, you switch 1 of them with your Active Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

Flavor: It launches kicks while spinning. If it spins at high speed, it may bore its way into the ground.

name: Unown [J] - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Ability (Pokémon Power) - [Join]: Once during your turn (before your attack), if you have Unown [J], Unown [O], Unown [I], and Unown Dragon on your Bench, you may search your deck for a Basic Pokémon or Evolution card. Show that card to your opponent, then put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

Attack (Psychic) - Hidden Power: 10 damage. 

Flavor: Their shapes look like hieroglyphs on ancient tablets. It is said that the two are somehow related.

name: Misdreavus - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Pain Split: Put 1 damage counter on the Defending Pokémon for each damage counter on Misdreavus.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic) - Confuse Ray: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Evolves into: Mismagius

Flavor: It loves to bite and yank people's hair from behind without warning, just to see their shocked reactions.

name: Machamp - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Evolves from: Machoke

Attack (Fighting + Fighting) - Seething Anger: 20+ damage. Flip a number of coins equal to the number of damage counters on Machamp. This attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each heads.

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Colorless + Colorless) - Fling: 50 damage. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

Flavor: Using its amazing muscles, it throws powerful punches that can knock its victim clear over the horizon.

name: Magmar - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Fire) - Burning Fire: 10+ damage. When you use this attack, you may discard any number of Fire Energy cards attached to your Pokémon in play. This attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Fire Energy card you discarded in this way.

Attack (Fire + Fire + Colorless) - Magma Punch: 40 damage. 

Evolves into: Magmortar

Flavor: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.

name: Scyther - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Grass + Grass) - Slashing Strike: 40 damage. Scyther can't use this attack during your next turn. (Benching or evolving Scyther ends this effect.)

Evolves into: Scizor

Flavor: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.

name: Electabuzz - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Attack (Lightning) - Lightning Rod: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and put a Lightning Rod marker on it. (A Pokémon can have only 1 Lightning Rod marker on it at a time.)

Attack (Lightning + Lightning) - Lightning Bolt: 10 damage. This attack does 20 damage to any Pokémon with a Lightning Rod marker on it. Apply Weakness and Resistance.

Evolves into: Electivire

Flavor: Normally found near power plants, it can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.

name: Mew - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Ability (Pokémon Power) - Neutral Shield: Prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Mew by Evolved Pokémon. You can't use this power if Mew is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Psychic) - Psyshock: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Flavor: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.

name: Articuno - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Ability (Pokémon Power) - Aurora Veil: As long as Articuno is your Active Pokémon, your Benched Pokémon do not take damage from and are not affected by attacks. This power cannot be used if Articuno is affected by a Special Condition.

Attack (Water + Water + Colorless + Colorless) - Ice Beam: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Flavor: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

name: Snorlax - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Ability (Pokémon Power) - Guard: As long as Snorlax is your Active Pokémon, the Defending Pokémon can't Retreat. This power stops working when Snorlax is affected by a Special Condition.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Roll Over: 30 damage. Snorlax is now Asleep. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Flavor: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.

name: Celebi - Wizards Black Star Promos
description: Attack (Grass + Colorless) - Leaf Slice: 20× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Rapidash - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Evolves from: Ponyta

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Jump Over: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Attack (Fire + Colorless + Colorless) - Super Singe: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

name: Ho-oh - Wizards Black Star Promos
description: Attack (Fire + Fire + Colorless + Colorless) - Sacred Wing: 60 damage. Flip a coin. If tails, this attack's base damage is 20 instead of 60.

name: Suicune - Wizards Black Star Promos
description:
Ability - Pure Body: To attach a Water Energy card from your hand to Suicune, you must discard an Energy card attached to Suicune. (Attach the Water Energy, and then discard an Energy card from Suicune.)

Attack (Water + Colorless + Colorless) - Hypno Wave: 30+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage. If tails, this attack does 30 damage and the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Aerodactyl - Fossil
description:
Evolves from: Mysterious Fossil

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Prehistoric Power: No more Evolution cards can be played. This power stops working while Aerodactyl is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Wing Attack: 30 damage. 

Flavor: A ferocious prehistoric Pokémon that goes for the enemy's throat with its serrated saw-like fangs.

name: Articuno - Fossil
description:
Attack (Water + Water + Water) - Freeze Dry: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Attack (Water + Water + Water + Water) - Blizzard: 50 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If tails, this attack does 10 damage to each of your own Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Flavor: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

name: Ditto - Fossil
description:
Ability (Pokémon Power) - Transform: If Ditto is your Active Pokémon, treat it as if it were the same card as the Defending Pokémon, including type, Hit Points, Weakness, and so on, except Ditto can't evolve, always has this Pokémon Power, and you may treat any Energy attached to Ditto as Energy of any type. Ditto isn't a copy of any other Pokémon while Ditto is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Flavor: Capable of copying an enemy's genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.

name: Dragonite - Fossil
description:
Evolves from: Dragonair

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Step In: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Dragonite is on your Bench, you may switch it with your Active Pokémon.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Slam: 40× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 40 damage times the number of heads.

Flavor: An extremely rarely seen marine Pokémon. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.

name: Gengar - Fossil
description:
Evolves from: Haunter

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Curse: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move 1 damage counter from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon to another (even if it would Knock Out the other Pokémon). This power can't be used if Gengar is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic + Psychic) - Dark Mind: 30 damage. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 10 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Flavor: Under a full moon, this Pokémon likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.

name: Haunter - Fossil
description:
Evolves from: Gastly

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Transparency: Whenever an attack does anything to Haunter, flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of that attack, including damage, done to Haunter. This power stops working while Haunter is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Psychic + Colorless) - Nightmare: 10 damage. The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

Evolves into: Gengar

Flavor: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from another dimension.

name: Hitmonlee - Fossil
description:
Attack (Fighting + Fighting) - Stretch Kick: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 20 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Fighting) - High Jump Kick: 50 damage. 

Flavor: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.

name: Hypno - Fossil
description:
Evolves from: Drowzee

Attack (Psychic) - Prophecy: Look at up to 3 cards from the top of either player's deck and rearrange them as you like.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic + Psychic) - Dark Mind: 30 damage. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 10 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Flavor: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of psi moves such as Hypnosis and Confusion.

name: Kabutops - Fossil
description:
Evolves from: Kabuto

Attack (Fighting + Fighting) - Sharp Sickle: 30 damage. 

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Fighting + Fighting) - Absorb: 40 damage. Remove a number of damage counters from Kabutops equal to half the damage done to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance) (rounded up to the nearest 10). If Kabutops has fewer damage counters than that, remove all of them.

Flavor: Its sleek shape is perfect for swimming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.

name: Lapras - Fossil
description:
Attack (Water) - Water Gun: 10+ damage. Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Water Energy attached to Lapras but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

Attack (Water + Water) - Confuse Ray: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Flavor: A Pokémon that has been overhunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across water.

name: Magneton - Fossil
description:
Evolves from: Magnemite

Attack (Lightning + Colorless) - Sonicboom: 20 damage. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for this attack. (Any other effects that would happen after applying Weakness and Resistance still happen.)
