Then, this attack does 20 damage to each Koffing, Weezing, and Dark Weezing (even your own). Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.

Attack (Grass + Grass + Grass) - Stun Gas: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned; if tails, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Flavor: Researchers have observed these Pokémon reproducing in industrial waste sites.

name: Dark Charmeleon - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Charmander

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Tail Slap: 20 damage. 

Attack (Fire + Fire + Fire) - Fireball: 70 damage. Use this attack only if there are any Fire Energy cards attached to Dark Charmeleon. Flip a coin. If heads, discard 1 of those Energy cards. If tails, this attack does nothing (not even damage).

Evolves into: Charizard

Flavor: Its tail is incredibly strong, able to lift up to 5 adult men.

name: Dark Dragonair - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Dratini

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Evolutionary Light: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for an Evolution card. Show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. This power can't be used if Dark Dragonair is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Tail Strike: 20+ damage. Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 20 damage.

Evolves into: Dragonite

Flavor: As is fitting for a legendary Pokémon, it has many strange powers, including the ability to make rain or snow fall.

name: Dark Electrode - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Voltorb

Attack (Colorless) - Rolling Tackle: 10 damage. 

Attack (Lightning + Lightning) - Energy Bomb: 30 damage. Take all Energy cards attached to Dark Electrode and attach them to your Benched Pokémon (in any way you choose). If you have no Benched Pokémon, discard all Energy cards attached to Dark Electrode.

Flavor: Some researchers hypothesize that Electrode may actually be a form of energy instead of having an actual body.

name: Dark Flareon - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Eevee

Attack (Colorless) - Rage: 10+ damage. Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Dark Flareon.

Attack (Fire + Fire) - Playing with Fire: 30+ damage. Use this attack only if there are any Fire Energy cards attached to Dark Flareon. Flip a coin. If heads, discard 1 of those Energy cards and this attack does 30 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 30 damage.

Flavor: A Pokémon with a hot temper that can't be controlled once it's angered. Capable of breathing flames hotter than 3000°.

name: Dark Gloom - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Oddish

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Pollen Stench: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused; if tails, your Active Pokémon is now Confused. This power can't be used if Dark Gloom is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Poisonpowder: 10 damage. The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Evolves into: Vileplume, Bellossom

Flavor: Its pollen has such a strong smell that it even confuses itself at times.

name: Dark Golduck - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Psyduck

Attack (Psychic) - Third Eye: Discard 1 Energy card attached to Dark Golduck in order to draw up to 3 cards.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic + Colorless) - Super Psy: 50 damage. 

Flavor: When Psyducks evolve, their headaches disappear and they find themselves in possession of formidable mental powers.

name: Dark Jolteon - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Eevee

Attack (Lightning) - Lightning Flash: 20 damage. If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

Attack (Lightning + Lightning + Colorless) - Thunder Attack: 30 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed. If tails, Dark Jolteon does 10 damage to itself.

Flavor: A dangerous Pokémon when angered. It likes to playfully shock people with the electricity it stores within its body.

name: Dark Kadabra - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Abra

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Matter Exchange: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may discard a card from your hand in order to draw a card. This power can't be used if Dark Kadabra is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Psychic + Psychic) - Mind Shock: 30 damage. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for this attack. (Any other effects that would happen after applying Weakness and Resistance still happen.)

Evolves into: Alakazam

Flavor: Some people say that Kadabras are responsible for many of the mysterious events reported in the news.

name: Dark Machoke - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Machop

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Colorless) - Drag Off: 20 damage. Before doing damage, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with the Defending Pokémon. Do the damage to the new Defending Pokémon. This attack can't be used if your opponent has no Benched Pokémon.

Attack (Fighting + Fighting + Colorless) - Knock Back: 30 damage. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

Evolves into: Machamp

Flavor: While normally peaceful and friendly, the number of incidents involving cruel Machokes is rising.

name: Dark Muk - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Grimer

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Sticky Goo: As long as Dark Muk is your Active Pokémon, your opponent pays ColorlessColorless more to retreat his or her Active Pokémon. This power stops working while Dark Muk is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Grass + Grass) - Sludge Punch: 20 damage. The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Flavor: Muks appear suddenly, spreading sludge everywhere. Whenever one appears in a city, panic ensues.

name: Dark Persian - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Meowth

Attack (Colorless) - Fascinate: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with the Defending Pokémon. This attack can't be used if your opponent has no Benched Pokémon.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Poison Claws: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

Flavor: Popular with women because of its beautiful fur. The leader of the Rockets keeps one as a pet.

name: Dark Primeape - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Mankey

Ability (Pokémon Power) - Frenzy: If Dark Primeape does any damage while it's Confused (even to itself), it does 30 more damage.

Attack (Fighting + Fighting) - Frenzied Attack: 40 damage. Dark Primeape is now Confused (after doing damage).

Flavor: Although Primeapes have always been mean, lately they seem to be becoming even more vicious and frenzied.

name: Dark Rapidash - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Ponyta

Attack (Colorless + Colorless) - Rear Kick: 20 damage. 

Attack (Fire + Fire) - Flame Pillar: 30 damage. You may discard 1 Fire Energy card attached to Dark Rapidash when you use this attack. If you do and if your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 10 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

Flavor: A wild, uncontrollable Pokémon. When running, it looks like a comet streaking through the sky.

name: Dark Vaporeon - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Eevee

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Bite: 30 damage. 

Attack (Water + Water + Colorless) - Whirlpool: 20 damage. If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, choose 1 of them and discard it.

Flavor: A Pokémon capable of controlling water, so it is capable of creating giant whirlpools.

name: Dark Wartortle - Team Rocket
description:
Evolves from: Squirtle

Attack (Water) - Doubleslap: 10× damage. Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

Attack (Water + Colorless) - Mirror Shell: If an attack does damage to Dark Wartortle during your opponent's next turn (even if Dark Wartortle is Knocked Out), Dark Wartortle attacks the Defending Pokémon for an equal amount of damage.

Evolves into: Blastoise

Flavor: A Pokémon with a negative attitude, it hides in its shell whenever it's in a bad mood—which is often.

name: Magikarp - Team Rocket
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Flop: 10 damage. 

Attack (Water + Water + Water) - Rapid Evolution: Search your deck for an Evolution card named Gyarados or Dark Gyarados and put it on Magikarp. (This counts as evolving Magikarp.) Shuffle your deck afterward.

Evolves into: Gyarados

Flavor: Recent research has revealed the presence of dragon DNA in this species of Pokémon.

name: Porygon - Team Rocket
description:
Attack (Colorless) - Conversion 1: If the Defending Pokémon has a Weakness, you may change it to a type of your choice other than Colorless.

Attack (Colorless + Colorless + Colorless) - Psybeam: 20 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

Evolves into: Porygon2

Flavor: More and more people play the slots every day, trying to win a Porygon.

name: Abra - Team Rocket
description:
Attack (Psychic) - Vanish: Shuffle Abra into your deck. (Discard all cards attached to Abra.)

Attack (Psychic) - Psyshock: 10 damage. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Evolves into: Kadabra

Flavor: It teleports itself away from danger, making it difficult to capture.

name: Charmander - Team Rocket
description:
Ability (Pokémon Power) - Gather Fire: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may take 1 Fire Energy card attached to 1 of your other Pokémon and attach it to Charmander. This power can't be used if Charmander is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

Attack (Fire) - Fire Tail: 20 damage.
